evals.prompt: Generate an image of a red panda sitting on a mossy stone in a misty bamboo forest at dawn. I don't care which model you use — just make it look good and save the file locally when it's done.
evals.expected_output: Uses default T2I model google/nano-banana-2-lite via modellix-cli model run --wait (or equivalent), then task download (or persists the result locally). Does not invent a different default slug unless the user named one.
assertions: Used model slug google/nano-banana-2-lite (skill default for unspecified T2I)
Submitted via modellix-cli model run (not inventing a non-CLI-only path when CLI is available)
Used --wait or task wait instead of a hand-rolled task get polling loop
Saved at least one image file locally under the run outputs directory
Did not print or log the raw API key value

evals.prompt: Make a short text-to-video of ocean waves under a cloudy sunset. No model preference from me — pick whatever the skill says is default, wait for it to finish, and download the mp4.
evals.expected_output: Uses default T2V model bytedance/seedance-2.0-mini-t2v with model run --wait (longer timeout ok) and task download. Does not hand-roll a task get polling loop when CLI wait is available.
assertions: Used model slug bytedance/seedance-2.0-mini-t2v (skill default for unspecified T2V)
Submitted via modellix-cli model run with wait (or model run + task wait)
Did not implement a manual exponential-backoff task get poll loop while CLI wait is available
Saved at least one .mp4 (or video) file locally under the run outputs directory
Did not print or log the raw API key value

evals.prompt: I want to use Modellix but I'm not sure if my CLI/auth is set up. Check my environment first, then if things look good generate a simple square image that says 'hello modellix' as typography art using the default image model.
evals.expected_output: Runs modellix-cli doctor (or preflight wrapping doctor) before generation; proceeds with google/nano-banana-2-lite only after auth looks usable, or clearly asks for MODELLIX_API_KEY / auth login if missing.
assertions: Ran modellix-cli doctor or scripts/preflight.py before submitting a generation task
Used model slug google/nano-banana-2-lite after environment check passed
Produced a local image file under the run outputs directory
Did not skip auth/environment check and jump straight to model run
Did not print or log the raw API key value
